text: hint about self improvement only when developing aimparency itself
description:
The hint " I am your supervisor AI agent. you can improve me in the wrapped agents <claude/gemini/...> package." does not make sense when using aimparency on other projects than itself. 
Maybe we can make this postfix a configurable one in project meta settings. And for this aimparency repo we keep the sentece (I like telling the agent with every message, it's in your hands. reminder. you can improve this yourself)

status.comment: Project-specific supervisor guidance is configurable and empty by default; Aimparency retains its self-improvement reminder. Awaiting human acceptance.

reflection: Added optional supervisorGuidancePrefix to project meta, backend update contract, and Project Settings. Watchdog reads it per natural-language worker message; slash commands remain untouched and projects without the field receive no Aimparency-specific hint. Set the reminder only in this repo. Verified: wrapped-agents 63/63 tests, backend 20/20 tests, ProjectSettingsModal 4/4 tests, common typecheck, backend build, frontend production build, git diff --check.
